summary.warehouse_scope: Runtime input only: WAREHOUSE_SCOPE=ALL, one warehouse, or comma-separated warehouses.
summary.semantic_policy: Semantic matching is a recall add-on for exact misses only.
summary.pos_resolution: One POS transaction can belong to at most one lead; near ties within 3 points go to manual review.
summary.lead_resolution: One lead can match many POS transactions over time; earliest qualifying transaction is primary.
